title: Warnings generated for unevaluated ternary operands

features.name: ternary_constant_condition_with_out_of_range_unevaluated_branch
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator with a constant parameter condition where the unevaluated branch contains an out-of-bounds part-select access

features.name: reduction_operator_on_part_select_exceeding_width
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator applied to a part-select where the part-select range exceeds the wire width, causing out-of-bounds access
